$comment: Registry of schema-drift-gate targets. To onboard a new Supabase-based template: add supabase gen types typescript output as <template>/src/types/database.generated.ts, a schema-drift.config.json mapping hand types to table names, then add an entry here — both CI jobs (structural gate + regen-check) pick it up automatically, no other wiring needed.
name: community_membership_saas
